message:
fix(tui): resolve clippy warnings in threads.rs (sort_by_key, cast_precision_loss)

Replace sort_by closures with sort_by_key + Reverse where applicable.
Add #[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] for velocity f64 casts
where precision loss is acceptable for display purposes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
